items.name: FuPanda
items.description:
In Chinese tradition, Panda's symbolize peace, luck, friendship, and unity.

Meet FuPanda! A chubby little Panda happily munching on his bamboo.
⚠️ WARNING: Do not grab or take it away from him… he won’t be happy!!

Join our group for more UGC's: https://www.roblox.com/communities/32926627/Valkyrjur
